title: 明天天气怎么样？
description_uz: «Bugun havo qanaqa?» — ikki do'stning ob-havo va kunlik rejalar haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog ob-havoni tasvirlash, reja taklif qilish va chastota bildirishni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, foydali kundalik so'zlar — har kuni asqotadi. Shadowing va ravon gapirish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Какая сегодня погода?» — разговор двух друзей о погоде и планах на день. Этот диалог учит описывать погоду, предлагать план и говорить о частоте действий. Близкая тема, полезная повседневная лексика — пригодится каждый день. Отлично для шэдоуинга и беглой речи.
description_en: «How's the weather today?» — two friends chatting about the weather and their plans for the day. This dialogue teaches describing weather, suggesting plans, and talking about frequency. Familiar topic, useful everyday vocabulary—handy every single day. Great for shadowing and building fluency.

sentences.text_original: 今天下雨。明天天气怎么样？
sentences.pinyin: Jīn tiān xià yǔ. Míng tiān tiān qì zěn me yàng?
sentences.text_translation: Bugun yomg'ir yog'yapti. Ertaga havo qanday bo'ladi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сегодня идёт дождь. Какая завтра будет погода?
sentences.text_translation_en: It's raining today. What will the weather be like tomorrow?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 明天天气很好，不冷不热。
sentences.pinyin: Míng tiān tiān qì hěn hǎo, bù lěng bú rè.
sentences.text_translation: Ertaga havo yaxshi bo'ladi, na sovuq, na issiq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Завтра погода хорошая, не холодно и не жарко.
sentences.text_translation_en: Tomorrow the weather is nice, neither cold nor hot.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ men míng tiān qù nǎ lǐ wán?
sentences.text_translation: Unda ertaga qayerga sayr qilgani boramiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда куда мы завтра пойдём гулять?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then where should we go to hang out tomorrow?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men qù gōng yuán tī zú qiú ba.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай пойдём в парк играть в футбол.
sentences.text_translation_en: Let's go to the park and play football.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú huì tī zú qiú.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я не умею играть в футбол.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那我们在家看电视可以吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ men zài jiā kàn diàn shì kě yǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then can we watch TV at home?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 在家不好玩，我们去买衣服吧。
sentences.pinyin: Zài jiā bù hǎo wán, wǒ men qù mǎi yī fu ba.
sentences.text_translation: Uyda qiziq emas, yur, kiyim olgani boramiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Дома неинтересно, давай пойдём покупать одежду.
sentences.text_translation_en: Staying home is boring; let's go shopping for clothes.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Qù nǎ yí ge shāng chǎng mǎi yī fu?
sentences.text_translation: Qaysi savdo markaziga kiyim olgani boramiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В какой торговый центр пойдём за одеждой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which mall should we go to for clothes?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 火车站后面的那个商场。
sentences.pinyin: Huǒ chē zhàn hòu miàn de nà ge shāng chǎng.
sentences.text_translation: Temir yo'l vokzali orqasidagi haligi savdo markaziga.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В тот торговый центр за железнодорожным вокзалом.
sentences.text_translation_en: The mall behind the train station.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men zěn me qù? Zuò dì tiě ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do we get there? By subway?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zuò gōng gòng qì chē ba, hěn jìn.
sentences.text_translation_en: Let's take the bus, it's very close.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men míng tiān jǐ diǎn jiàn?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time shall we meet tomorrow?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 上午十点在火车站见，可以吗？
sentences.pinyin: Shàng wǔ shí diǎn zài huǒ chē zhàn jiàn, kě yǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab soat o'nda temir yo'l vokzalida uchrashsak, bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай встретимся в десять утра на вокзале, хорошо?
sentences.text_translation_en: Let's meet at ten in the morning at the train station, okay?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ, míng tiān shí diǎn jiàn!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, see you at ten tomorrow!
sentences.speaker: B
